case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ALEMAN. MIGUEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,909.92 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN. MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN. MIGUEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-25-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-10-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES.
